issues.title: Proposal for Applying Enum Objects
issues.body:
https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/1ea851515f670fb7326aa0252ca9dd53699b05cd/spring-ai-core/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/image/ImageOptions.java#L34

Is there a specific reason for using String?
I would suggest using **enum objects** instead.
